title: Job Opening Teacher at Osmania University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Osmania University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
